# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test Pull Request
on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v2
      with:
        java-version: '11'

    - name: Cache dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-dependencies-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        path: ~/.m2

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: mvn install

    - name: Test code
      run: mvn test

    - name: Post test results
      if: success()
      uses: actions/github-script@v4
      with:
        github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        script: |
          const comment = `Tests passed 🎉\n!\[All checks\](\${{ job.runs_url }})\n`
          context.github.issues.createComment({ issue_number: Number(context.payload.pull_request.number), body: comment })
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
